purpose: Standalone stylesheet for the IDE Debug Panels area (Variables, Call Stack, Breakpoints, Watch). Defines .debug-panels container (vertical scroll with thin custom scrollbar), .debug-panel-section collapsible groups with header (cursor:pointer, expand/collapse on click), .debug-panel-section-title (uppercase letter-spaced), and per-panel item styling for variable rows, stack frames, breakpoint entries, and watch expressions.
gotchas: DUPLICATE: ide-debug.css ALSO defines .debug-panels styles (lines 641-1124 there). The two may diverge — edit both when fixing rules.
Uses var(--bg, #1e1e1e) etc. fallback pattern; if --bg is the typical #0a0a0c, the panel background will differ from the surrounding chrome.
Panel sections use cursor:pointer on header for expand/collapse — relies on JS toggling an .expanded/.collapsed class (verify component usage when changing).
patterns: Custom thin scrollbar via scrollbar-width:thin + scrollbar-color combo.
Collapsible section pattern with header acting as toggle.
conventions: Class prefix: .debug-panel-* (note: singular 'panel' — distinct from .debug-panels container).
